rows.label: tev000201_MSG0001
rows.name:
We would like to open up a shop
here, but traveling with you
sounds like additional fun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0002
rows.name:
What do you say, my friend? Will you
help us quench our thirsty knowledge?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to get in your whey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Giogion can watch the store while we're
away, so we're free to accompany you
whenever you see fit to have us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Shall we not travel the wilds
of Mira while our thirst for
knowledge still hungers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0031
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0041
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to bet in your weigh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Your mission involves seeking
out unidentified xenoforms? That
sounds right up our alleyway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Please let us join you. We
are quite confident that we
would be of much assistance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0051
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0060
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to bee in your sway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0025
rows.name:
While we would relish the
opportunity to help you search
for that mech you seek...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Alas, we lack a mechanical
body, and would be most swiftly
spotted by the tainted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0027
rows.name:
So we fear we must entrust
this mission to you. We hope
you are feeling lucky, punk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0032
rows.name:
You received an emergency aid request
from Iriina's team, my friend?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Then we must make haste on the double
time! Please allow us to accompany you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0071
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0034
rows.name:
Your faith in us shall not be mislaid!
We will see Iriina safely back home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0035
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0036
rows.name:
So you've been tasked with exploring White
Woods? It is a most strange land, with
scenery quite unlike anything around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0037
rows.name:
The prospect sends our thirst for
knowledge into a frenzy of drinking.
You must allow us to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0091
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0038
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to get in your whey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0039
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0044
rows.name:
Ah, what fortuitous timing! We are buying
supplies to make some new items, and it is
costing us, as you say, a lovely nickel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0045
rows.name:
We were just thinking what a perfect
time it would be to accompany you to
White Woods. Are you game, friend?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0111
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to get in your whey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0047
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0048
rows.name:
It makes no sense... Why would Mr.
Lao be involved with the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0049
rows.name:
But perhaps it is folly to even
speculate. Let us look for truth
straight inside the gift horse's mouth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0050
rows.name:
We must travel to the Growth's
headquarters and ask Mr. Lao directly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0131
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0051
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to bet in your weigh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0052
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0057
rows.name:
How we yearn to see this Central
Life that has been sustaining the
lives of our human friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0058
rows.name:
Please allow us to accompany you
on this most fateful of days![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0151
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0059
rows.name:
And all that ends well shall be
well indeed. We will fight for
humanity with all of our vigor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0060
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0065
rows.name:
Now that the Growth are on their last
eggs, we were considering opening a
shop or something of that ilk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0066
rows.name:
Yet our thirst for knowledge about
Mira remains ever unquenched.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0067
rows.name:
If you plan to leave the city,
we would be most grateful for
the opportunity to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0170
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0171
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0180
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0181
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0068
rows.name:
Delighted to hear it! We will
try not to bee in the sway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0069
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0070
rows.name:
Now that Luxaar is dead and the
Growth are dusty wind, there is
no one who may stand in our way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0071
rows.name:
Shall we not travel the wilds
of Mira while our thirst for
knowledge still hungers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0190
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0191
rows.name: Add Lu to your team.

rows.label: tev000201_JNK0200
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000201_SEL0201
rows.name: Decline Lu's request for now.

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0072
rows.name:
Delightful! We will try
not to get in the whey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000201_MSG0073
rows.name:
Ahh. Most unfortunate. Should
you change your mind, we stand
willing to join you.[ST:wait ]
